description_long: This is a large barn structure situated on a snow-covered plot, featuring two main elongated sections joined at an angle, with a smaller outbuilding attached. The barn has a prominent gable roof with a secondary, slightly lower gable intersecting it, creating a T-shaped layout. The exterior appears to be clad in metal panels, giving it a utilitarian, agricultural look. There are several visible doors and a few small windows distributed along the sides, with the main entrance located at the end of the longer section. A tall, silo-like structure stands adjacent to the barn, adding to its rural character. The surrounding ground is flat and open, covered in snow, with minimal landscaping or fencing.
description: A large, T-shaped barn with intersecting gable roofs, metal panel siding, and a few small windows and doors, set on a snowy open plot with an adjacent silo.
description_view_0: The barn is seen from above and slightly to the side, showing the T-shaped layout, the main gable roof, and the attached outbuilding, with the silo visible to the left.
description_view_1: This view highlights the long side of the barn, the main entrance at the end, and the silo directly behind the barn, emphasizing the building's length.
description_view_2: The rear of the barn is visible, showing the intersection of the two gable roofs and the silo to the right, with fewer visible doors and windows.
description_view_3: The opposite end of the barn is shown, focusing on the smaller outbuilding and the connection between the two main sections, with the snowy ground in the foreground.
attribute_door_style: single large sliding door at the end, with additional smaller hinged doors
attribute_window_arrangement: several small windows spaced irregularly along the sides
